text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, is that today? Thanks for the reminder. I
needed to make updates to all of my data.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? How could you forget your birthday?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, age itself can be important for research, but
what I find most intriguing is recording the effects
of time on the body, and—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a sec... Is no one celebrating your
birthday with you?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? No, not really... I do receive gifts, but such
things are nonnecessities—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Then let's have a party for you! I'll go get
everyone together right now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wait, listen to me. Though it'd be beneficial for
my test subjects to gather in one place, their
attention on me would make observing rather
diffi—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We'll get all sorts of food too. Oh, and I've
already got your present. I bet you're going to
love it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This'll be great, Tachyon. You're going to get a
party you'll remember for the rest of your life!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...I'm always perplexed by that force of will and
inability to listen of yours. Perhaps it's some
hereditary trait from your parents?
